Properties.AlarmDescription: Alarm when getProducts Lambda has errors
Alarm when createOrder Lambda has errors

C:\\Users\\vparr\\Documents\\Proyectos D.serviceRawFile:
# "org" ensures this Service is used with the correct Serverless Framework Access Key.
org: ingrid1991
service: nexora-backend

custom:
  productsTableName: ${env:PRODUCTS_TABLE, 'Products'}
  ordersTableName: ${env:ORDERS_TABLE, 'Products'}

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: nodejs18.x
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'dev'}
  region: us-east-1
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:Scan
            - dynamodb:Query
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:DescribeTable
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${aws:region}:${aws:accountId}:table/${self:custom.productsTableName}
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - dynamodb:PutItem
            - dynamodb:UpdateItem
            - dynamodb:GetItem
            - dynamodb:DescribeTable
          Resource:
            - arn:aws:dynamodb:${aws:region}:${aws:accountId}:table/${self:custom.ordersTableName}
  environment:
    PRODUCTS_TABLE: ${self:custom.productsTableName}
    ORDERS_TABLE: ${self:custom.ordersTableName}
    ALLOWED_ORIGIN: ${env:ALLOWED_ORIGIN, '*'}
    AWS_NODEJS_CONNECTION_REUSE_ENABLED: '1'

functions:
  getProducts:
    handler: src/products.getProducts
    events:
      - http:
          path: products
          method: get
          cors: true

  createOrder:
    handler: src/orders.createOrder
    events:
      - http:
          path: orders
          method: post
          cors: true

resources:
  Resources:
    GetProductsErrorsAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: ${self:service}-${sls:stage}-getProducts-errors
        AlarmDescription: Alarm when getProducts Lambda has errors
        Namespace: AWS/Lambda
        MetricName: Errors
        Dimensions:
          - Name: FunctionName
            Value: ${self:service}-${sls:stage}-getProducts
        Statistic: Sum
        Period: 300
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 1
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching

    CreateOrderErrorsAlarm:
      Type: AWS::CloudWatch::Alarm
      Properties:
        AlarmName: ${self:service}-${sls:stage}-createOrder-errors
        AlarmDescription: Alarm when createOrder Lambda has errors
        Namespace: AWS/Lambda
        MetricName: Errors
        Dimensions:
          - Name: FunctionName
            Value: ${self:service}-${sls:stage}-createOrder
        Statistic: Sum
        Period: 300
        EvaluationPeriods: 1
        Threshold: 1
        ComparisonOperator: GreaterThanOrEqualToThreshold
        TreatMissingData: notBreaching
